title: Management

Management

ALT MENÜ

Charmain of The Board of Trustees

Board of Trustees

Academic Management

Rector

Vice Rectors

The Senate

Management Board

Former Rectors

Administrative Management

General Secretary

Dear Students,

The doors of our university are always open to you! We are starting the new term with excitement and affection. Are you ready for this journey filled with opportunities we offer?

We are eagerly looking forward to sharing the excitement and energy of the new term with you. Our university is committed to providing the most suitable environment for you to develop as equipped and visionary individuals meeting the demands of the era.

Our university, which nurtures students with a contemporary educational approach, aims to provide a unique educational experience by combining health with technology and emphasizing the importance of industrial collaboration.

Established under the patronage of a leading institution in international product development and patent ownership, our university offers world-class educational opportunities. With the vision of the university’s senior management in the field of health, we aim to train you to be the leaders of the future.

With a student-centered approach, we strive to make your educational experience as productive as possible. We offer support across a wide range of areas, from career planning to social activities.

In a rapidly evolving world, accessing information is changing swiftly, and adapting to this change is more important than ever. Our university aims to develop students through innovative educational approaches and technology-integrated programs.

In addition to academic knowledge, we prepare our students for professional life by developing skills such as problem-solving, communication, and leadership. We collaborate with the industry to develop projects that help our students enter the business world more prepared.

As a university that looks confidently towards the future, we are dedicated to nurturing individuals who uphold ethical values, are sensitive to global issues, and possess social responsibility. We are delighted to have you at our university and look forward to sharing in your successes.

With Respect and Affection,

Prof. Dr. Buğra ÖZEN

Rector, ISTUN
